de.uka.ilkd.key.control.UserInterfaceControl

  • Packages that use UserInterfaceControl 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.control  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen
    This package contains the graphical user interface of the test generation backend.

    • Uses of UserInterfaceControl in de.uka.ilkd.key.control

      Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.control with type parameters of type UserInterfaceControl 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  KeYEnvironment<U extends UserInterfaceControl>
      Instances of this class are used to collect and access all relevant information for verification with KeY.
      Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.control that implement UserInterfaceControl 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractUserInterfaceControl
      Provides a basic implementation of UserInterfaceControl.
      class  DefaultUserInterfaceControl
      The DefaultUserInterfaceControl which allows proving in case that no specific user interface is available.

      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  WindowUserInterfaceControl
      Implementation of UserInterfaceControl which controls the MainWindow with the typical user interface of KeY.

    • Uses of UserInterfaceControl in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

      Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util with type parameters of type UserInterfaceControl 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  SymbolicExecutionEnvironment<U extends UserInterfaceControl>
      Instances of this class are used to collect and access all relevant information for symbolic execution tree extraction of Proofs via an SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.

    • Uses of UserInterfaceControl in de.uka.ilkd.key.ui

      Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.ui that implement UserInterfaceControl 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
      Provides a basic implementation of UserInterfaceControl for user interfaces in which a KeYMediator is available.
      class  ConsoleUserInterfaceControl
      Implementation of UserInterfaceControl used by command line interface of KeY.
